name: Folic acid
summary: Established folate supplement tracked for small human biomarker studies of lymphocyte micronucleus frequency and one-carbon metabolism in chromosome-stability contexts.
mechanism_summary: Supports one-carbon metabolism and nucleotide/methylation biology that can influence homocysteine and chromosomal damage biomarkers such as micronucleus frequency.

open_questions: Whether chromosome-stability biomarker changes depend on baseline folate, B12, homocysteine, or renal-disease status
Whether micronucleus changes translate into durable functional or disease outcomes
Whether folic acid alone is sufficient outside deficiency or high-risk metabolic contexts
